command_groups.command: git add -- src/native/embree/rtdl_embree_api.cpp src/native/embree/rtdl_embree_prelude.h src/native/optix/rtdl_optix_api.cpp src/native/optix/rtdl_optix_prelude.h src/native/optix/rtdl_optix_workloads.cpp src/native/vulkan/rtdl_vulkan_api.cpp src/native/vulkan/rtdl_vulkan_core.cpp src/native/vulkan/rtdl_vulkan_prelude.h src/rtdsl/__init__.py src/rtdsl/db_perf.py src/rtdsl/embree_runtime.py src/rtdsl/optix_runtime.py src/rtdsl/oracle_runtime.py src/rtdsl/vulkan_runtime.py

git add -- README.md docs/README.md docs/features/README.md docs/features/db_workloads/README.md docs/history/goals/v0_7_goal_sequence_2026-04-15.md docs/quick_tutorial.md docs/release_facing_examples.md docs/release_reports/v0_7/audit_report.md docs/release_reports/v0_7/release_statement.md docs/release_reports/v0_7/support_matrix.md docs/release_reports/v0_7/tag_preparation.md docs/tutorials/db_workloads.md
